This is a wdspec test.
[FAIL] test_locale_set_override_and_reset
  AssertionError: assert 'en-US' == 'de-DE'
[FAIL] test_locale_values[en]
  AssertionError: assert 'en-US' == 'en'
[FAIL] test_locale_values[sr-Latn]
  AssertionError: assert 'en-US' == 'sr-Latn'
[FAIL] test_locale_values[zh-Hans-CN]
  AssertionError: assert 'en-US' == 'zh-Hans-CN'
Harness: the test ran to completion.
